chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-137 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 05.12.2025 Mr. Irfan Ahmed Qureshi advocate for petitioner *** Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition, which stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
